aspect.invalid: Custom aspect ratio must be positive numbers.

zoom.cannotPlaceDescription: Zoom already exists at this location or not enough space available.
zoom.unavailableWhileLooping: Suggested zooms are unavailable while cursor looping is enabled.
zoom.noCursorTelemetryDescription: Record a screencast first to generate cursor-based suggestions.
zoom.noUsableCursorTelemetryDescription: The recording does not include enough cursor movement data.
zoom.noInteractionMomentsDescription: Try a recording with pauses or clicks around important actions.
zoom.noSlotsDescription: Detected dwell points overlap existing zoom regions.

trim.cannotPlaceDescription: Trim already exists at this location or not enough space available.

speed.cannotPlaceDescription: Speed region already exists at this location or not enough space available.

empty.title: No Video Loaded
empty.description: Drag and drop a video to start editing

trimTutorial.title: How Trimming Works
trimTutorial.description: Understanding how to cut out unwanted parts of your video.
trimTutorial.explanation: The Trim tool works by defining the segments you want to remove. Any part of the timeline that is covered by a red trim segment will be cut out when you export.
trimTutorial.step1Suffix: or click the scissors icon to mark a section for removal.
trimTutorial.step2Description: Drag the edges of the red region to cover exactly what you want to cut out.
